parts.text:
<think>

</think>

I'll start by reading the README spec and examining the existing files to understand what needs to be built.

<|tool>Bash
<arg_key>command</arg_key>
<arg_value>find /USER\Workspace\kyahoofinance032926 -name "README*" -type f | head -5</arg_value>
<arg_key>description</arg_key>
<arg_value>Find README files in project</arg_value>
</tool|>
<tool>Bash
<arg_key>command</arg_key>
<arg_value>ls -la /USER\Workspace\kyahoofinance032926\src\markets\fx\</arg_value>
<arg_key>description</arg_key>
<arg_value>List FX market directory structure</arg_value>
</tool|>
<tool>Bash
<arg_key>command</arg_key>
<arg_value>if (Test-Path "/USER\Workspace\kyahoofinance032926\src\markets\fx\components\FXSidebar.jsx") { echo "FXSidebar.jsx exists" } else { echo "FXSidebar.jsx does not exist" }</arg_value>
<arg_key>description</arg_key>
<arg_value>Check if FXSidebar component exists</arg_value>
</tool|>
